microsoft-learn__microsoft_docs_search: Searches Microsoft Learn documentation for any Azure service, Microsoft product, or developer topic. Returns guidance articles, reference pages, titles, URLs, and excerpts. Covers all Azure domains: networking, security, compute, storage, databases, identity, monitoring, DevOps, AI, and governance.
